query:
SELECT al.id, al.talent_name, al.channel_id, al.short_code,
       yc.channel_name AS resolved_channel
FROM affiliate_links al
LEFT JOIN youtube_channels yc ON yc.channel_id = al.channel_id
ORDER BY al.id;
